description: Cross-platform conformance fixture for Social Studio post extraction. Feeding each case's `messages` to the platform's extractSocialArtifacts port must yield exactly `expected` (in order). The web/desktop TypeScript implementation is validated against this file in apps/shared/src/social-contract.test.ts; the Kotlin and Swift ports should assert the same.

cases.name: linkedin-post block with markdown image under Artifacts

messages.content:
Here you go:

```linkedin-post
We shipped Fabric.

Here is why it matters.
```

## Artifacts

![Launch graphic](assets/launch.png)

expected.caption:
We shipped Fabric.

Here is why it matters.

cases.name: user message that names the fence is never parsed

messages.content: Put the result in a ```linkedin-post``` block please.

cases.name: text-only post has a null image and null timestamp
bare image path under an Artifacts list, bullet not swallowed
multiple drafts across the conversation keep order and unique ids
